features.name: combinational case with default assignment as full mux
features.description: Code should include a combinational always block where a default assignment precedes a case statement that covers all selector values, forming a complete multiplexer pattern

features.name: multi-way case selection with 2-bit selector
features.description: Code should include a case statement with a multi-bit selector choosing among four or more data inputs of matching width

features.name: preceding default value before case in combinational block
features.description: Code should include a default value assignment before a case statement in a combinational always block, where the case does not include a default branch
